subcodes.first_line: O Faḍl! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee and giveth thee glad tidings of that which hath been sent down for thee from the Most Exalted Pen in this perspicuous Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فضل یذکرک المظلوم و یبشرک بما نزل لک من القلم الاعلی فی هذا الکتاب المبین
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @alchemy; the elixir, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
